text: Moving from the enclosed, disciplined space of a meeting room to the vibrant and open creative zone, I feel a transition from confinement to curiosity. The first room, behind glass, symbolizes order, routine, perhaps a sense of being observed. Here, outside, among colors and interactive exhibits, I sense liberation—an invitation to explore, to let my thoughts roam. The contrast reminds me how context shapes reflection: rules and creativity, boundaries and possibilities. I feel both heightened awareness of structure and a gentle pull toward wonder.
